reports.description: multiple basements flooded and roads blocked/closed
references: Murenabgänge nach Unwetter: Bundesstraße bei Brückl verlegt, 5min.at, 8 June 2026.

reports.description: A lightning struck a tree causing damage. The time was based on Blitzortung lightning detection system.
A lightning struck an abandoned residential building causing fire and damage. The time was based on Blitzortung lightning detection system.
references: "Piorun uderzył w dom w Łąkiem. Doszło do pożaru budynku", PZL24, 08 JUN 2026.

reports.description: A downed tree on a railway track was reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Burza na Pomorzu. Drzewo spadło na tory", RMF24, 07 JUN 2026.

reports.description: torrential rain during thunderstorm | measured by CHMI rain gauge station
references: Hlásná a předpovědní povodňová služba (HPPS), CHMI, 10 JUN 2026

reports.description: Significant damage to crops was reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Uprawy zniszczone w kilka minut. Rolnik nie mógł uwierzyć: „Jak po kosiarce bijakowej”", Tygodnik Poradnik Rolniczy, 09 JUN 2026.
